title: Indulgent British Uni Skillet
description: A rich and buttery British dish featuring uni, perfect for a special occasion, made in a cast-iron skillet.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large cast-iron skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the smoked salmon slices and cook for 2 minutes on each side.
Remove the salmon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter to the skillet and stir in the uni.
Pour in the eggs and scramble them gently with a whisk.
Add the cherry tomatoes, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the salmon to the skillet and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and serve hot.
